svg.title: Livepeer OSS stack — full repo map
svg.desc: Nine-layer architecture diagram covering all major Livepeer repos from hosted products at the top to community tooling at the base.

g.text: Managed APIs — no node operation required
Consume Studio or AI Gateway from your app
Direct inference access · operator portals · billing
Node binary — all roles · ingest · media plane
Agent SDK built on the full compute stack

svg.text: Official repos: livepeer/ org · Community: livepeer-exporter, Stronk-Tech, pymthouse (eliteprox/)
